residential.title: Regular residential cleaning
residential.description: Give your home impeccable cleanliness with a reliable and discreet service tailored to your needs, including complete surface cleaning and floor care (vacuuming and mopping).

commercial.title: Commercial Cleaning
commercial.description: Give your professional spaces a clean, healthy and spotless environment with tailored cleaning services, adapted to the requirements of your industry.
features: Supermarkets and large surfaces (IGA, Pharmaprix, etc.)
Customized cleaning programs tailored to your needs

airbnb.title: Deep cleaning
airbnb.description: Give your space a complete and thorough cleaning with a professional, meticulous, and premium service, including interior and exterior surface care, cleaning of hard-to-reach areas, and detailed treatment of each room. All our services are fully customizable based on your needs and the specifics of your space. Certain conditions may apply depending on the level of maintenance required.
features: Interior and exterior of refrigerator and freezer
Interior cleaning of cabinets and drawers
High areas (tops of cabinets, light fixtures, vents)
Cleaning of doors, frames, and moldings
Washing and folding sheets and clothes
Interior and exterior cleaning of garbage and recycling bins

airbnbCleaning.title: Airbnb cleaning
airbnbCleaning.description: Service designed for short-term rentals, with fast and meticulous turnover cleaning between guests.
features: Kitchen, bathroom, and common area cleaning
Detailed dusting of surfaces and furniture

staffing.title: Dedicated maintenance staff
staffing.description: Need experienced cleaning staff? We provide trained, reliable housekeeping professionals to fill your positions.

moveRenovation.title: Post-construction and move-out cleaning
moveRenovation.description: A specialized service designed to restore your spaces to an impeccable condition after moving or construction work. Our teams work with precision to remove residue, dust, and marks left behind by the work, so you can enjoy a clean, healthy space ready for occupancy.
features: Complete removal of construction dust (walls, ceilings, surfaces)
Deep cleaning of surfaces, corners, and hard-to-reach areas
Full washing of floors, baseboards, and stairs
Interior cleaning of cabinets, drawers, and storage spaces
Cleaning of doors, handles, switches, and frames
Detailed finishing for a move-in-ready space
Final inspection to ensure an impeccable result

about.title: About Mr Clean+
about.subtitle: Your trusted cleaning partner in Montreal
about.description: Mr Clean+ is a professional cleaning company serving Montreal, Laval, the North Shore and the South Shore. We offer reliable services tailored to residential and commercial needs. Our team consists of trained, rigorous and trustworthy professionals committed to delivering consistent, high-quality results at every visit.
about.companyDescription: Provides professional cleaning services for residential and commercial sectors, with a rigorous, reliable and client-focused approach. Our qualified team ensures a clean, healthy and spotless environment through effective methods and professional products adapted to each surface, while guaranteeing consistent, high-quality service in Montreal, Laval, on the North Shore and South Shore.

faq.title: FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Here are the most common questions about our cleaning services.
faq.ctaText: Our team can guide you based on your residential or commercial needs.

items.question: How are your prices calculated?
items.answer: Our prices are based on the size of the space, the type of service, and the level of cleaning required. We provide a clear, free, no-obligation quote based on your availability before any intervention.

items.question: What is regular cleaning?
items.answer: Regular cleaning is a recurring maintenance service for your home or business, performed at the frequency of your choice (weekly, biweekly, monthly, or one-time). It includes cleaning essential areas such as the kitchen, bathroom, living room, and bedrooms, including dusting, surface care, vacuuming, and floor washing. This service is ideal to maintain a clean, healthy, and consistently well-kept environment based on your needs.

items.question: What is included in a deep cleaning?
items.answer: Deep cleaning includes more detailed work on surfaces, harder-to-reach areas, and rooms that require extra time. The exact scope is confirmed with you before the visit.

items.question: Do you provide commercial cleaning for businesses and retail locations?
items.answer: Yes. We provide commercial cleaning services adapted to large spaces (IGA, Pharmaprix, supermarkets, etc.) as well as small and medium spaces such as offices, restaurants, retail stores, and other establishments. Our interventions are flexible and adjusted to your schedule so your operations are not disrupted. Services can also be performed outside business hours, based on your needs.

items.question: Do you bring your own products and equipment?
items.answer: Yes. Our team arrives with the required tools and products. If you prefer eco-friendly products or specific supplies, we can adapt.

items.question: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
items.answer: It is not required. Many clients provide us with secure access to their home or workplace with confidence. We apply reliable procedures to ensure the security of your premises, and we agree together on the most practical option based on your preferences.

items.question: Can I reschedule or cancel an appointment?
items.answer: Yes, appointments can be rescheduled or canceled with advance notice. This helps us reorganize scheduling efficiently.

items.question: Do you serve Montreal and nearby areas?
items.answer: Yes. We serve Montreal, Laval, the North Shore, and the South Shore for both residential and commercial cleaning.

items.question: What if I am not satisfied with the result?
items.answer: Your satisfaction matters. Contact us quickly and we will review the situation and provide a fair, prompt solution.

footer.description: Professional and reliable cleaning services offered in Montreal, Laval, on the North Shore, and on the South Shore. Customer satisfaction is at the heart of our commitment.
